name: Apttus Corp.
lede: Apttus runs four capability centers across four Indian cities. Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chennai and Pune, covering engineering & design and R&D, built over fourteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Apttus office in India. We map four, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Apttus Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Apttus runs 4 verified GCC centers across 4 Indian cities (Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chennai, Pune), covering engineering & design and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Apttus's India footprint covers Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chennai and Pune, spanning engineering & design and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Business Intelligence Software, Business Software Solutions

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all four decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Apttus operate in India?
faq.a: Apttus operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Apttus have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Apttus's India GCC footprint spans Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chennai and Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Apttus run in India?
faq.a: Apttus runs engineering & design and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Apttus's India GCCs?
faq.a: Apttus's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Apttus's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 4 leaders at Apttus's India centers, across HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
